name: generate_state_audit
description: Generate a full quality audit for a specific state including volume and success rates.
sql: SELECT ORG_NM, TOT_FILE_CNT, SCS_CNT, SCS_PCT_FILE FROM audit_base WHERE (CNT_STATE = ? OR ? IS NULL) ORDER BY TOT_FILE_CNT DESC

name: check_stuck_pipeline
description: Find all files stuck or stopped in a specific stage for a state.
sql: SELECT ID, ORG_NM, LATEST_STAGE_NM, DART_REVIEW_HEALTH FROM stuck_base WHERE (CNT_STATE = ? OR ? IS NULL) AND (LATEST_STAGE_NM = ? OR ? IS NULL)

name: retry_improvement_tracker
description: Find organizations where retries (Run 2+) significantly improved success rates.
sql: SELECT ORG_NM, RUN_NO, SCS_PCT_FILE FROM retry_base WHERE (CNT_STATE = ? OR ? IS NULL) AND RUN_NO <= 2 ORDER BY ORG_NM, RUN_NO
